name: Md Shariful Haque Hira
title: Founder & Lead Photographer
tagline: Where technical mastery meets artistic vision.
bio: I'm Md Shariful Haque Hira — founder of Hira Photography and a multidisciplinary creative with over 15 years of professional experience. My journey blends photography, cinematography, graphic design, and digital strategy into a single, unified creative practice.

What sets my work apart is the intersection of technical precision and artistic instinct. As an electrical engineer by training and a visual artist by calling, I approach every shoot with both the analytical mindset to craft perfect lighting setups and the emotional intelligence to capture authentic, timeless moments.
From intimate weddings and high-fashion editorials to corporate brand campaigns and cinematic event coverage — I bring the same uncompromising commitment to quality to every project.
vision: To redefine visual storytelling — creating photographs and cinematic work that don't just document moments, but elevate them into lasting art. Every frame is intentional. Every image tells a story worth preserving forever.
